questions.text: Which of these is an abiotic component of environment?
questions.explanation: Water is an abiotic (non-living) component. Plants, animals, and bacteria are biotic (living) components.

questions.text: Energy flow in an ecosystem is cyclic.
questions.explanation: Energy flow in an ecosystem is unidirectional (one-way), not cyclic. It flows from sun → producers → consumers → decomposers.

questions.correctAnswer: A sequence showing transfer of food energy from one organism to another.
questions.explanation: A food chain shows how energy and nutrients flow from producers to consumers in a linear sequence.

questions.text: The functional unit of environment is ________.
questions.explanation: An ecosystem is the functional unit of environment where living organisms interact with each other and with their physical environment.
